payload.answer: Ingestion aborted due to malformed URL and network failure. No durable memory committed.

entity_resolution.reason: No resolvable entities exist in failed ingestion context.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at malformed URL (punctuation/format error: 'https -//examplecom/missing'). Network error (404) encountered during mock fetch attempt.

details: URL parsing failed: invalid scheme/host (punctuation/whitespace in 'https -//examplecom')
No memory cards persisted due to critical failure

repair_options: Check network connectivity for target domain
Verify article existence via alternative sources
